error.message: The ViewData item that has the key 'domain' is of type 'System.Int32' but must be of type 'IEnumerable<SelectListItem>'.
error.detail: System.InvalidOperationException: The ViewData item that has the key 'domain' is of type 'System.Int32' but must be of type 'IEnumerable<SelectListItem>'. at
